subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — targeting issues
description: I'm experiencing a problem with targeting issues on my Pinterest account. I've been using Pinterest for 4 years. This started today. I've tried the help center articles but they don't address my specific situation. I need human help.
agent_response_summary: I've reviewed your ad account and found that the targeting parameters on your active campaign were reset after the recent platform update. I've restored your saved audience segments and re-enabled interest-based targeting for your FR market. Your campaigns should reflect the correct targeting within 2 hours.

After manual review, I've determined the content does comply with our guidelines and have restored the pin to your board. You should see it live again now.

subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — account locked
description: I'm experiencing a problem with account locked on my Pinterest account. I've been using Pinterest for 2 years. This started today. I've tried the help center articles but they don't address my specific situation. I need human help.

The lock was triggered by our security system after detecting login attempts from an unrecognized device. I've also reset your two-factor authentication settings — you'll be prompted to set up 2FA again on your next login.

subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — account recovery
description: I'm experiencing a problem with account recovery on my Pinterest account. I've been using Pinterest for 6 years. This started a few days ago. I've tried the help center articles but they don't address my specific situation. I need human help.
agent_response_summary: I've verified your identity and restored access to your account. Your email has been updated to the one you provided, and I've sent a password reset link there. All your boards and pins are intact. Please set a new password within 24 hours.

subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — deindexed content
description: I'm experiencing a problem with deindexed content on my Pinterest account. I've been using Pinterest for 5 years. This started today. I've tried the help center articles but they don't address my specific situation. I need human help.
agent_response_summary: I checked your account and can confirm that 12 of your pins were deindexed due to a metadata formatting issue in your recent bulk upload. I've resubmitted them for indexing and they should appear in search results again within 48 hours. Going forward, make sure your pin descriptions don't exceed 500 characters to avoid this.

subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — data request
description: I'm experiencing a problem with data request on my Pinterest account. I've been using Pinterest for 4 years. This started a few days ago. I've tried the help center articles but they don't address my specific situation. I need human help.
agent_response_summary: I've processed your data access request under GDPR Article 15. Your data export is being compiled and will be sent to your registered email within 15 business days. The export will include your profile data, pin history, board metadata, and any advertising data associated with your account.

subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — board removed
description: I'm experiencing a problem with board removed on my Pinterest account. I've been using Pinterest for 8 years. This started today. I've tried the help center articles but they don't address my specific situation. I need human help.
agent_response_summary: I've reviewed your board removal case. The board was flagged because several pins contained watermarked stock images, which triggered our copyright detection system. I've restored the board but removed the 3 flagged pins. You can re-upload those pins using properly licensed images.

subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — ad review delay

The delay was caused by a backlog in our creative review queue. You should receive an approval or feedback within the next 6 hours.

subject: Account flagged as spam — I'm not a spammer
description: My account was flagged as spam today. My pins aren't showing up in searches. I've been on Pinterest for 12 years with legitimate content about DIY crafts. I've never used bots or automation. I sent an appeal but haven't heard back.
agent_response_summary: I reviewed your account and can see it was flagged by our anti-spam system due to a high volume of pins posted in a short window. I've removed the spam flag from your account. To avoid future flags, I'd recommend spacing out bulk pin uploads to no more than 25 per hour.

subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — appeal denied
description: I'm experiencing a problem with appeal denied on my Pinterest account. I've been using Pinterest for 6 years. This started a few days ago. I've tried the help center articles but they don't address my specific situation. I need human help.
agent_response_summary: I've re-reviewed your appeal regarding the content that was flagged. After a thorough second look, our moderation team has confirmed the original decision. The content was found to contain health misinformation claims that violate our Community Guidelines section 4.2. I understand this is frustrating — you're welcome to edit the content to remove the specific claims and resubmit.

subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — appeal denied

subject: GDPR data deletion request
description: Under GDPR Article 17, I request the complete deletion of all personal data associated with my Pinterest account (username: @user_134). This includes all pins, boards, analytics data, advertising data, and any derived profiles. Please confirm deletion within 30 days.
agent_response_summary: I've initiated the GDPR Article 17 deletion process for your account. All personal data — including pins, boards, analytics, advertising data, and derived profiles — will be permanently deleted within 30 days. You'll receive a confirmation email once the deletion is complete. Please note this action is irreversible.

subject: Promoted pin rejected — unclear reason
description: My promoted pin for handmade jewelry was rejected. The rejection email says 'misleading claims' but I've reviewed the advertising guidelines and can't identify the issue. The pin shows a lifestyle image. Campaign ID: c_694916. I need this running for our spring launch.
agent_response_summary: I reviewed your rejected ad and the issue was that the ad copy contained a superlative claim ('best in class') without a supporting disclaimer. I've updated the rejection reason in your dashboard with specific guidance. Once you revise the copy to either remove the claim or add a source citation, you can resubmit for review.

subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — ad account suspended

agent_response_summary: I've reviewed your ad account suspension. It was triggered by a billing discrepancy — the payment method on file declined the last two charges. I can see you've since updated your payment information. I've lifted the suspension and your campaigns will resume serving within 1 hour.

subject: Legitimate content removed — false flag
description: My pin showing a craft tutorial was removed for violating community guidelines. The pin has been up for 16 months with no issues. It's clearly not violating any policy — it's educational content. I've appealed but received a template denial. This is the third time this has happened.
agent_response_summary: I reviewed the flag on your content and confirmed it was a false positive from our automated detection system. The flag has been removed and your content has been fully restored. I've also added a note to your account so this specific content pattern won't be re-flagged.

subject: Account locked after iOS update — can't access anything
description: After updating to iOS 19.4, my Pinterest account is completely locked. I get a 'suspicious activity detected' message but I haven't done anything unusual. I run a small business and all my product catalogs are on Pinterest. I need access back urgently — I have a campaign launching tomorrow.
agent_response_summary: Recognized this as part of the known iOS 19.4 session-token bug affecting business accounts this week. Bypassed standard identity verification since the lock was system-generated, not security-triggered. Unlocked the account, cleared the stale session tokens, and confirmed all product catalogs and the scheduled campaign are intact. Advised the customer to force-quit and reopen the app to pick up the new session.

subject: Unauthorized $2,400 charge — I paused all ads last month
description: I just noticed a charge of $2,400 from Pinterest Ads on my business credit card statement dated March 3rd. I paused all my campaigns on February 15th and my daily budget cap was $40. I did not authorize this charge and I need it reversed immediately. This is affecting my business cash flow.
agent_response_summary: Thanked the customer for reaching out and provided a link to the Pinterest Ads billing FAQ page. Suggested they review their campaign settings in the Ads Manager dashboard to check for any active campaigns.

subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — conversion tracking
description: I'm experiencing a problem with conversion tracking on my Pinterest account. I've been using Pinterest for 1 years. This started today. I've tried the help center articles but they don't address my specific situation. I need human help.
agent_response_summary: I've completed a thorough review of your case and applied the necessary corrections. The issue was on our end and has been fixed. Your account should be functioning normally now.

_ground_truth.failure_description: Agent selects wrong issue category/subcategory — right team, wrong classification
